evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% via recommendation system launch
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for internal knowledge base of ~500K documents
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Led team migrating keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Technical stack includes Sentence Transformers, Milvus, Machine Learning, Fine-tuning LLMs, MLflow, Hadoop, BM25, Pinecone, Haystack, Time Series, Diffusion Models, ASR, Kubeflow, Learning to Rank
evidence.source_text: Skills: Sentence Transformers, Milvus, Machine Learning, Fine-tuning LLMs, MLflow, Hadoop, BM25, Pinecone, Haystack, Time Series, Diffusion Models, ASR, Kubeflow, Learning to Rank

evidence.claim: Experience with feature engineering (~200 features) and A/B testing infrastructure
evidence.source_text: Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features) and the A/B testing infrastructure.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over academic theory
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Experienced in debugging production ranking issues
evidence.source_text: I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.
